name: Notify Client Before Follow-Up
script:
# Get today's date today = frappe.utils.today() # Get all opportunities where the follow-up date is exactly tomorrow tomorrow = frappe.utils.add_days(today, 1) opportunities = frappe.get_all( "Opportunity", filters={"next_follow_up_date": tomorrow}, fields=["name", "party_name", "contact_email", "next_follow_up_date"] ) for opp in opportunities: if not opp.contact_email: continue # Skip if no email is set subject = "Upcoming Follow-Up Reminder" message = f"""

Dear {opp.party_name},

This is a friendly reminder that your next follow-up for Opportunity {opp.name} is scheduled on {opp.next_follow_up_date}.

We are reaching out a day in advance so you can be well prepared.

Regards,
Sales Team

""" frappe.sendmail( recipients=[opp.contact_email], subject=subject, message=message )

name: Notify Salesperson After Follow-Up Missed
script:
# leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", # filters={ # "follow_up_date": frappe.utils.add_days(frappe.utils.nowdate(), -1), # "status": ["not in", ["Converted", "Closed", "Pending Follow-Up"]] # }, # fields=["name", "lead_name", "owner"] # ) # for lead in leads: # if lead.owner: # frappe.sendmail( # recipients=[lead.owner], # subject="Reminder: Missed Follow-up", # message=f""" #

Dear {lead.owner},

#

You missed following up on lead {lead.lead_name} scheduled for yesterday.

#

Please take appropriate action in the CRM system.

#
#

Regards,
CRM System

# """ # ) # ## one notification in one day so that script will be that # # --- Part 1: Missed follow-ups (email) --- # yesterday = frappe.utils.add_days(frappe.utils.nowdate(), -1) # leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", # filters={ # "follow_up_date": yesterday, # "status": ["not in", ["Converted", "Closed", "Pending Follow-Up"]] # }, # fields=["name", "lead_name", "owner"] # ) # owner_leads = {} # for lead in leads: # if lead.owner: # owner_leads.setdefault(lead.owner, []).append(lead.lead_name) # for owner, lead_names in owner_leads.items(): # count = len(lead_names) # frappe.sendmail( # recipients=[owner], # subject="⏰ Daily Reminder: Missed Lead Follow-ups", # message=f""" #

Dear {owner},

#

You have {count} Lead(s) that had follow-up scheduled for yesterday and are still pending.

#

Lead Names: {", ".join(lead_names)}

#
#

Regards,
CRM System

# """ # ) # # --- Part 2: Bell Notification for inactivity (only once per day) --- # sales_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Sales User"}, fields=["parent"]) # usernames = [u.parent for u in sales_users] # now = frappe.utils.now_datetime() # today = frappe.utils.nowdate() # for username in usernames: # # Check if user was inactive in last 24 hours # last_activity = frappe.db.get_value("Activity Log", # {"owner": username, "operation": "Save"}, # "creation", # order_by="creation desc" # ) # if last_activity and (now - last_activity).total_seconds() < 86400: # continue # User is active, skip # # Check if notification was already sent today # already_notified = frappe.db.exists("Notification Log", { # "for_user": username, # "subject": "⚠️ No CRM Activity in Last 24 Hours", # "creation": [">=", today] # }) # if already_notified: # continue # Already notified today # # Send notification # notif = frappe.new_doc("Notification Log") # notif.subject = "⚠️ No CRM Activity in Last 24 Hours" # notif.for_user = username # notif.type = "Alert" # notif.email_content = "You haven't performed any activity in the CRM in the past 24 hours. Please take action." # notif.save(ignore_permissions=True) # Get yesterday's date yesterday = frappe.utils.add_days(frappe.utils.nowdate(), -1) # Get all Leads where follow-up was scheduled yesterday and still pending leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", filters={ "follow_up_date": yesterday, "status": ["not in", ["Converted", "Closed", "Pending Follow-Up"]] }, fields=["name", "lead_name", "owner"] ) # Loop through each Lead and send bell notification only once for lead in leads: if not lead.owner: continue # skip if no owner # Check if Notification Log already exists for this Lead already_notified = frappe.db.exists("Notification Log", { "document_type": "Lead", "document_name": lead.name, "subject": "⚠️ Follow-up Missed", "for_user": lead.owner }) if already_notified: continue # already notified for this lead before # Send Notification Log (bell icon) notif = frappe.new_doc("Notification Log") notif.subject = "⚠️ Follow-up Missed" notif.for_user = lead.owner notif.type = "Alert" notif.document_type = "Lead" notif.document_name = lead.name notif.email_content = f"You missed the follow-up for Lead: {lead.lead_name} scheduled on {yesterday}." notif.save(ignore_permissions=True)

name: Notify Inactive Tickets
script:
def notify_users_of_inactive_leads(): now = frappe.utils.now_datetime() leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", filters={ "status": ["not in", ["Converted", "Closed"]] }, fields=["name", "lead_name", "email_id", "phone", "owner", "creation", "modified", "status", "lead_temperature", "follow_up_date"] ) leads_by_owner = {} for lead in leads: assign_time = lead.creation modified_time = lead.modified deadline = frappe.utils.add_to_date(assign_time, hours=24) # Skip if updated within 24 hours if modified_time > assign_time: continue if now < deadline: continue owner = lead.owner if not leads_by_owner.get(owner): leads_by_owner[owner] = {"pending_count": 0, "leads": []} leads_by_owner[owner]["pending_count"] = leads_by_owner[owner]["pending_count"] + 1 leads_by_owner[owner]["leads"].append({ "name": lead.name, "lead_name": lead.lead_name, "email_id": lead.email_id, "phone": lead.phone, "follow_up_date": lead.follow_up_date, "status": lead.status, "lead_temperature": lead.lead_temperature, "assign_time": assign_time }) for owner in leads_by_owner: data = leads_by_owner[owner] for lead in data["leads"]: lead_url = frappe.utils.get_url(f"/app/lead/{lead['name']}") follow_up = frappe.utils.formatdate(lead["follow_up_date"]) if lead["follow_up_date"] else "N/A" assign_time = frappe.utils.formatdate(lead["assign_time"]) message = f"""

Dear {owner},

No updates were made to the following Lead in the 24 hours after it was created (assigned to you):

Lead ID{lead['name']}
Lead Name{lead['lead_name']}
Email{lead['email_id'] or "N/A"}
Phone{lead['phone'] or "N/A"}
Status{lead['status'] or "Not Set"}
Temperature{lead['lead_temperature'] or "Not Set"}
Follow-up Date{follow_up}
Assigned At{assign_time}
View Link{lead_url}

You currently have {data["pending_count"]} leads pending first action after creation.

""" frappe.sendmail( recipients=[owner], subject=f"Reminder: No action on Lead {lead['name']} after creation", message=message ) # Run the function notify_users_of_inactive_leads() # def notify_leads_with_no_action_after_assignment(): # now = frappe.utils.now_datetime() # assignments = frappe.get_all("ToDo", # filters={"reference_type": "Lead", "status": "Open"}, # fields=["reference_name", "owner", "creation"] # ) # leads_by_owner = {} # for todo in assignments: # lead_name = todo.reference_name # assign_time = todo.creation # deadline = frappe.utils.add_to_date(assign_time, hours=24) # if now < deadline: # continue # lead = frappe.get_doc("Lead", lead_name) # # Check if any field is modified after assignment # fields_to_check = ["status", "lead_temperature", "follow_up_date"] # action_taken = False # for field in fields_to_check: # if lead.get(field) and lead.modified > assign_time: # action_taken = True # break # if not action_taken: # owner = todo.owner # if not leads_by_owner.get(owner): # leads_by_owner[owner] = {"pending_count": 0, "leads": []} # leads_by_owner[owner]["pending_count"] = leads_by_owner[owner]["pending_count"] + 1 # leads_by_owner[owner]["leads"].append({ # "name": lead.name, # "lead_name": lead.lead_name, # "email_id": lead.email_id, # "phone": lead.phone, # "follow_up_date": lead.follow_up_date, # "status": lead.status, # "lead_temperature": lead.lead_temperature, # "assign_time": assign_time # }) # for owner, data in leads_by_owner.items(): # for lead in data["leads"]: # lead_url = frappe.utils.get_url(f"/app/lead/{lead['name']}") # follow_up = frappe.utils.formatdate(lead["follow_up_date"]) if lead["follow_up_date"] else "N/A" # assign_time = frappe.utils.formatdate(lead["assign_time"]) # subject = f"Reminder: No action on Lead {lead['name']} after assignment" # message = f""" #

Dear {owner},

#

No updates were made to the following Lead in the 24 hours after it was assigned to you:

# # # # # # # # # # #
Lead ID{lead['name']}
Lead Name{lead['lead_name']}
Email{lead['email_id'] or "N/A"}
Phone{lead['phone'] or "N/A"}
Status{lead['status'] or "Not Set"}
Temperature{lead['lead_temperature'] or "Not Set"}
Follow-up Date{follow_up}
Assigned At{assign_time}
View Link{lead_url}
#

You currently have {data["pending_count"]} leads pending first action after assignment.

# """ # try: # user = frappe.get_doc("User", owner) # email = user.email or user.name # if email: # frappe.sendmail( # recipients=[email], # subject=subject, # message=message # ) # except Exception as e: # frappe.log_error(str(e), f"Failed to send inactivity notification to {owner}") # # Run the script # notify_leads_with_no_action_after_assignment()

name: Update Last Activity on Ticket Save
script:

frappe.get_doc({

    "content": f"Last activity time updated to {formatted_time}",

}).insert(ignore_permissions=True)

name: Lead Follow-up ToDo Creator
script:
leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", filters={ "follow_up_date": frappe.utils.add_days(frappe.utils.nowdate(), -1), "status": ["not in", ["Converted", "Closed", "Pending Follow-Up"]] }, fields=["name", "lead_name", "owner"] ) for lead in leads: frappe.errprint(f"Checking Lead: {lead.name}") if lead.owner: frappe.sendmail( recipients=[lead.owner], subject="Reminder: Missed Follow-up", message=f"""

Dear {lead.owner},

You missed following up on lead {lead.lead_name} scheduled for yesterday.

Please take appropriate action in the CRM system.


Regards,
CRM System

""" )

name: Send Quotation Follow-Up
script:
def execute():
    from frappe.utils import nowdate, add_days

    followup_day = add_days(nowdate(), -3)

    quotations = frappe.db.get_all("Quotation",
        filters={
            "transaction_date": followup_day,
            "status": "Submitted",
            "quotation_to": "Lead"
        },
        fields=["name", "customer_name", "party_name"]
    )

    for q in quotations:
        # Get email from the Lead
        lead_email = frappe.db.get_value("Lead", q.party_name, "email_id")

        message = f"""
        Dear {q.customer_name},

        Just following up on the quotation we shared (Quotation ID: {q.name}) 3 days ago.

        Please let us know your thoughts, and feel free to reply to this email if you have any questions.

        Best Regards,  
        EnerTech Sales Team
        """

        try:
            # Send email to the Lead
            frappe.sendmail(
                recipients=[lead_email],
                subject=f"Follow-up on Quotation {q.name}",
                message=message
            )

            # Log Communication
            frappe.get_doc({
                "doctype": "Communication",
                "subject": f"Follow-up Email Sent for Quotation {q.name}",
                "content": message,
                "sent_or_received": "Sent",
                "reference_doctype": "Quotation",
                "reference_name": q.name,
                "communication_type": "Communication",
            }).insert(ignore_permissions=True)

            frappe.msgprint(f"✅ Follow-up sent for Quotation {q.name} to Lead {q.party_name}")

        except Exception as e:
            frappe.msgprint(f"❌ Error for {q.name}: {str(e)}")

name: Quotation Sending to Mail After Submit
script:
# # =============================== # # GET CLIENT EMAIL # # =============================== # client_email = None # if doc.email_id: # client_email = doc.email_id # if not client_email and doc.party_name: # lead_email = frappe.db.get_value("Lead", doc.party_name, "email_id") # if lead_email: # client_email = lead_email # if not client_email: # opp = frappe.db.get_value( # "Opportunity", # {"party_name": doc.party_name}, # ["contact_email"], # as_dict=1 # ) # if opp and opp.contact_email: # client_email = opp.contact_email # if not client_email: # frappe.throw("No client email found") # # =============================== # # SALESPERSON EMAIL # # =============================== # salesperson_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", doc.owner, "email") # if not salesperson_email: # frappe.throw("Salesperson email not set") # # =============================== # # CC EMAILS (same for both Default & Custom) # # =============================== # cc_emails = [salesperson_email, "marketing@enertechups.com"] # # =============================== # # SUBJECT # # =============================== # subject = "Quotation from " + str(doc.company) + " - " + str(doc.name) # # =============================== # # MESSAGE LOGIC # # =============================== # customer = doc.customer_name or doc.party_name # if doc.custom_email_type == "Custom": # # Custom message — user-defined body # if not doc.custom_email_body: # frappe.throw("Please enter Custom Email Body") # message = doc.custom_email_body # else: # # Default message # message = "

Dear " + str(customer) + ",

" # message += "

Thank you for your inquiry.

" # message += "

Please find our quotation attached for your review.

" # message += "

If you have any questions please contact us.

" # message += "

Best Regards,
" + str(doc.owner) + "

" # # =============================== # # GENERATE PDF (always, for both Default & Custom) # # =============================== # pdf_data = frappe.get_print( # doc.doctype, # doc.name, # print_format="Enertech Quotation", # as_pdf=True # ) # # =============================== # # ATTACHMENTS (always attach PDF) # # =============================== # attachments = [{ # "fname": doc.name + ".pdf", # "fcontent": pdf_data # }] # # =============================== # # SEND EMAIL # # From: salesperson → To: customer → CC: salesperson + marketing # # =============================== # frappe.sendmail( # recipients=[client_email], # cc=cc_emails, # sender=salesperson_email, # subject=subject, # message=message, # attachments=attachments, # now=True # ) # =============================== # GET CLIENT EMAIL # =============================== client_email = None if doc.email_id: client_email = doc.email_id if not client_email and doc.party_name: lead_email = frappe.db.get_value("Lead", doc.party_name, "email_id") if lead_email: client_email = lead_email if not client_email: opp = frappe.db.get_value( "Opportunity", {"party_name": doc.party_name}, ["contact_email"], as_dict=1 ) if opp and opp.contact_email: client_email = opp.contact_email if not client_email: frappe.throw("No client email found") # =============================== # SALESPERSON EMAIL # =============================== salesperson_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", doc.owner, "email") if not salesperson_email: frappe.throw("Salesperson email not set") # =============================== # OWNER DETAILS # =============================== owner = frappe.get_doc("User", doc.owner) owner_name = owner.full_name or doc.owner owner_email = owner.email or "" owner_mobile = owner.mobile_no or "" owner_designation = frappe.db.get_value( "Employee", {"user_id": doc.owner}, "designation" ) or "" # =============================== # CC EMAILS # =============================== cc_emails = ["sales@enertechups.com ", "marketing@enertechups.com"] # =============================== # SUBJECT # =============================== subject = "Quotation from " + str(doc.company) + " - " + str(doc.name) # =============================== # MESSAGE LOGIC # =============================== customer = doc.customer_name or doc.party_name if doc.custom_email_type == "Custom": if not doc.custom_email_body: frappe.throw("Please enter Custom Email Body") message = doc.custom_email_body else: message = f"""

Dear Sir/Madam,

Greetings from EnerTech UPS!

Thank you for sharing your requirements and for your interest in our products.

We are pleased to introduce ourselves as a leading manufacturer of:

👉 Solar Hybrid Inverter – 5kVA to 300kVA
👉 HF Solar Hybrid Inverter – 3kW to 125kW
👉 Ongrid Solar Inverter – 2kW to 6kW
👉 BESS Solutions – 3kVA to MWh
👉 Online UPS – 5kVA to 600kVA
👉 Industrial Bidirectional Inverter – 5kVA to 300kVA
👉 Industrial Battery Charger – 48V/110V/220V up to 1000A
👉 Static Frequency Converter – 1kVA to 300kVA | 50/60/400 Hz
👉 Servo Voltage Stabilizer – 30kVA to 1000kVA

With reference to your requirement, please find attached our offer, including:

1. Quotation Offer
2. Product Catalogue

Products are certified by BIS, TUV, UL, and NISE labs approved under NABL policy.

With over 35+ years of manufacturing experience and expert knowledge of energy conversion.

Thank you for your time and consideration. We look forward to your valuable response and assure you of our best services at all times. Kindly feel free to reach out for any further clarification or technical discussion.


Warm Regards,
M/S EnerTech UPS Pvt. Ltd.

{owner_name}
{owner_designation}
{owner_mobile}
{owner_email}

""" # =============================== # GENERATE PDF # =============================== pdf_data = frappe.get_print( doc.doctype, doc.name, print_format="Enertech Quotation", as_pdf=True ) # =============================== # ATTACHMENTS — PDF + manual attachments # =============================== attachments = [{ "fname": doc.name + ".pdf", "fcontent": pdf_data }] manual_attachments = frappe.get_all( "File", filters={ "attached_to_doctype": doc.doctype, "attached_to_name": doc.name }, fields=["file_name", "file_url", "is_private"] ) for file in manual_attachments: try: file_doc = frappe.get_doc("File", {"file_url": file.file_url}) file_content = file_doc.get_content() attachments.append({ "fname": file.file_name, "fcontent": file_content }) except Exception as e: frappe.log_error( message=str(e), title="Attachment fetch failed: " + str(file.file_name) ) # =============================== # SEND EMAIL # =============================== frappe.sendmail( recipients=[client_email], cc=cc_emails, sender=salesperson_email, subject=subject, expose_recipients="header", message=message, attachments=attachments, now=True, send_priority=0, )

name: Sales Oeder sending Mail After Submit buttion click
script:
# # Trigger: After Submit # # Doctype: Sales Order # client_email = doc.contact_email # # Fallback 1: Customer.email_id # if not client_email and doc.customer: # client_email = frappe.db.get_value("Customer", doc.customer, "email_id") # # Fallback 2: Contact linked to Customer # if not client_email and doc.customer: # contact_name = frappe.db.get_value("Dynamic Link", { # "link_doctype": "Customer", # "link_name": doc.customer, # "parenttype": "Contact" # }, "parent") # if contact_name: # client_email = frappe.db.get_value("Contact", contact_name, "email_id") # # Error if still missing # if not client_email: # frappe.throw("Client email not found in Sales Order, Customer, or linked Contact. Please update and try again.") # # Salesperson fallback logic # salesperson_email = None # if doc.sales_team: # sales_person = doc.sales_team[0].sales_person # if sales_person: # user = frappe.db.get_value("Sales Person", sales_person, "user") # if user: # salesperson_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", user, "email") # # fallback to doc.owner # if not salesperson_email: # salesperson_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", doc.owner, "email") # # Email subject and message # subject = f"Sales Order Confirmation - {doc.name}" # message = f""" #

Dear {doc.customer_name or 'Customer'},

#

Thank you for your order. Please find attached your Sales Order {doc.name}.

#

Our team will process it shortly. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.

#

Regards,
{frappe.session.user}

# """ # # Generate PDF # pdf_data = frappe.get_print( # doc.doctype, # doc.name, # print_format="Standard", # as_pdf=True # ) # # Send email # frappe.sendmail( # recipients=[client_email], # cc=[salesperson_email] if salesperson_email else [], # subject=subject, # message=message, # attachments=[{ # "fname": f"{doc.name}.pdf", # "fcontent": pdf_data # }] # ) #------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ # Trigger: After Submit # Doctype: Sales Order # --- 1. Determine Recipient (Client's Email) --- client_email = doc.contact_email # Fallback 1: Get email from the linked Customer document if not client_email and doc.customer: client_email = frappe.db.get_value("Customer", doc.customer, "email_id") # Fallback 2: Get email from the primary Contact linked to the Customer if not client_email and doc.customer: # Find a contact linked to this customer contact_name = frappe.db.get_value("Contact", {"customer": doc.customer, "is_primary_contact": 1}, "name") if contact_name: client_email = frappe.db.get_value("Contact", contact_name, "email_id") # Error if client email is still missing after all checks if not client_email: frappe.throw("Email failed: Client email not found in Sales Order, Customer, or a primary Contact.") # --- 2. Determine Sender (Salesperson's Email) --- salesperson_email = None salesperson_name = None # Try to get sender from the Sales Team table first if doc.sales_team and doc.sales_team[0].sales_person: sales_person_doc_name = doc.sales_team[0].sales_person # Get the User linked to the Sales Person doctype user = frappe.db.get_value("Sales Person", sales_person_doc_name, "user") if user: salesperson_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", user, "email") salesperson_name = frappe.db.get_value("User", user, "full_name") # Fallback to the document owner if no sales person is found if not salesperson_email: owner = doc.owner salesperson_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", owner, "email") salesperson_name = frappe.db.get_value("User", owner, "full_name") # NEW: Final validation for the sender's email. Stop if not found. if not salesperson_email: frappe.throw("Email failed: Sender not found. The Sales Person or Document Owner must have a valid email in their User profile.") # --- 3. Prepare and Send Email --- subject = f"Order Confirmation from {doc.company} - {doc.name}" # UPDATED: The message now uses the salesperson's full name for a personal touch message = f"""

Dear {doc.customer_name or 'Customer'},

Thank you for your business. We have received your order and are processing it.

Please find your Sales Order {doc.name} attached for your records.

If you have any questions, please feel free to contact me directly.

Best regards,
{salesperson_name}

""" # Generate the PDF of the document pdf_data = frappe.get_print( doctype=doc.doctype, name=doc.name, print_format="Standard", # Use your custom Print Format name if you have one as_pdf=True ) # Send the final email frappe.sendmail( recipients=[client_email], # KEY CHANGE: Specify the sender to use their configured Email Account sender=salesperson_email, cc=[salesperson_email], subject=subject, message=message, attachments=[{ "fname": f"{doc.name}.pdf", "fcontent": pdf_data }], # NEW: This line ensures the email is sent immediately now=True )

name: Daily Lead Summary to Salesperson
script:
# # Get dates # today = frappe.utils.nowdate() # yesterday = frappe.utils.add_days(today, -1) # # Fetch leads assigned yesterday # yesterday_leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", # filters={"creation": ["between", [yesterday + " 00:00:00", yesterday + " 23:59:59"]]}, # fields=["name", "lead_name", "status", "owner", "follow_up_date"] # ) # # Group by owner # lead_summary = {} # for lead in yesterday_leads: # owner = lead.owner # if owner not in lead_summary: # lead_summary[owner] = { # "yesterday_assigned": [], # "status_counts": {}, # "today_followups": [] # } # lead_summary[owner]["yesterday_assigned"].append(lead) # status = lead.status or "Unknown" # lead_summary[owner]["status_counts"][status] = lead_summary[owner]["status_counts"].get(status, 0) + 1 # # Today's follow-ups # today_followups = frappe.get_all("Lead", # filters={"follow_up_date": today}, # fields=["name", "lead_name", "owner"] # ) # for lead in today_followups: # owner = lead.owner # if owner not in lead_summary: # lead_summary[owner] = { # "yesterday_assigned": [], # "status_counts": {}, # "today_followups": [] # } # lead_summary[owner]["today_followups"].append(lead) # # Send email per salesperson # for owner, data in lead_summary.items(): # status_list = [] # for status, count in data["status_counts"].items(): # status_list.append(f"
  • {status}: {count}
    • ") # status_table = "
      " + "".join(status_list) + "
    " # # Table for today's follow-ups # followup_rows = [] # for lead in data["today_followups"]: # followup_rows.append(f"{lead.get('lead_name')}{lead.get('name')}") # followup_table = ( # "" # "" # + "".join(followup_rows) + # "
    Lead NameLead ID
    " if followup_rows else "

    No follow-ups scheduled today.

    " # ) # # Send email # frappe.sendmail( # recipients=[owner], # subject="📝 Daily Lead Summary - CRM", # message=f""" #

    Dear {owner},

    #

    Here's your daily CRM lead summary:

    #

    📅 Leads Assigned Yesterday: {len(data["yesterday_assigned"])}

    # {status_table} #

    📌 Today's Follow-Ups

    # {followup_table} #

    Regards,
    CRM System

    # """ # ) today = frappe.utils.nowdate() yesterday = frappe.utils.add_days(today, -1) # Fetch leads created yesterday yesterday_leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", filters={ "creation": ["between", [yesterday + " 00:00:00", yesterday + " 23:59:59"]] }, fields=["name", "lead_name", "status", "owner", "follow_up_date", "lead_temperature"], ignore_permissions=True ) # Fetch today's follow-up leads today_followups = frappe.get_all("Lead", filters={"follow_up_date": today}, fields=["name", "lead_name", "owner"], ignore_permissions=True ) # Organize data per salesperson lead_summary = {} for lead in yesterday_leads: owner = lead.owner if owner not in lead_summary: lead_summary[owner] = { "yesterday_assigned": [], "status_counts": {}, "temp_counts": {}, "today_followups": [] } lead_summary[owner]["yesterday_assigned"].append(lead) # Status count status = lead.status or "Unknown" lead_summary[owner]["status_counts"][status] = lead_summary[owner]["status_counts"].get(status, 0) + 1 # Temperature count temp = lead.lead_temperature or "Not Set" lead_summary[owner]["temp_counts"][temp] = lead_summary[owner]["temp_counts"].get(temp, 0) + 1 # Add today's follow-ups for lead in today_followups: owner = lead.owner if owner not in lead_summary: lead_summary[owner] = { "yesterday_assigned": [], "status_counts": {}, "temp_counts": {}, "today_followups": [] } lead_summary[owner]["today_followups"].append(lead) # Send summary email to each owner for owner, data in lead_summary.items(): # Build table for yesterday's leads rows = [] for idx, lead in enumerate(data["yesterday_assigned"], 1): lead_link = f"{frappe.utils.get_url()}/app/lead/{lead.name}" rows.append(f""" {idx} {lead.name} {lead.lead_name} {lead.status or ''} {lead.lead_temperature or ''} {lead.follow_up_date or ''} View """) yesterday_table = f"""

    📅 Leads Assigned Yesterday: {len(data['yesterday_assigned'])}

    {''.join(rows)}
    Sr. No Lead ID Lead Name Status Lead Temp Follow-Up Date Lead Link
    """ if rows else "

    No leads assigned yesterday.

    " # Build table for today's follow-ups followup_rows = [] for lead in data["today_followups"]: lead_link = f"{frappe.utils.get_url()}/app/lead/{lead.name}" followup_rows.append(f""" {lead.lead_name} {lead.name} View """) followup_table = f"""

    📌 Today's Follow-Ups

    {''.join(followup_rows)}
    Lead Name Lead ID Link
    """ if followup_rows else "" # Summary block status_list = "".join( f"
  • {status}: {count}
    • " for status, count in data["status_counts"].items() ) temp_list = "".join( f"
  • {temp}: {count}
    • " for temp, count in data["temp_counts"].items() ) summary_block = f"""

    📝 Summary

    • Total Leads: {len(data["yesterday_assigned"])}
    • Status-wise Count:
        {status_list}
    • Lead Temp-wise Count:
        {temp_list}
    """ # Combine final message message = f"""

    Dear {owner},

    Here's your daily CRM lead summary:

    {yesterday_table} {followup_table} {summary_block}

    Regards,
    CRM System

    """ # Send the email frappe.sendmail( recipients=[owner], subject="📝 Daily Lead Summary - CRM", message=message )

Send Email # if recipients: # frappe.sendmail( # recipients=recipients, # subject="📝 Daily CRM Summary - " + yesterday, # message=html # ) # --------------------------------------------------------------above code is the proper code------------------------------------------- # 1. Setup Dates today = frappe.utils.nowdate() yesterday = frappe.utils.add_days(today, -1) # 2. Get all Leads created yesterday leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", filters={"creation": ["between", [yesterday + " 00:00:00", yesterday + " 23:59:59"]]}, fields=["status", "lead_temperature", "follow_up_date"], ignore_permissions=True ) # 3. Initialize counts status_counts = {} temperature_counts = {} followup_done = 0 followup_pending = 0 for lead in leads: # Count status status = lead.get("status") or "Unknown" if status not in status_counts: status_counts[status] = 1 else: status_counts[status] = status_counts[status] + 1 # Count temperature temp = lead.get("lead_temperature") or "Not Set" if temp not in temperature_counts: temperature_counts[temp] = 1 else: temperature_counts[temp] = temperature_counts[temp] + 1 # Follow-up if str(lead.get("follow_up_date")) == yesterday: followup_done = followup_done + 1 else: followup_pending = followup_pending + 1 # 4. Get Sales Orders created yesterday sales_orders = frappe.get_all("Sales Order", filters={"creation": ["between", [yesterday + " 00:00:00", yesterday + " 23:59:59"]]}, fields=["name"], ignore_permissions=True ) total_sales_orders = len(sales_orders) # 5. Get Manager/Owner user emails role_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": ["in", ["Manager", "Owner"]]}, fields=["parent"] ) user_ids = [] for ru in role_users: if ru["parent"] not in user_ids: user_ids.append(ru["parent"]) users = frappe.get_all("User", filters={"name": ["in", user_ids], "enabled": 1}, fields=["email"] ) recipients = [] for u in users: if u.get("email") and u.get("email") not in recipients: recipients.append(u.get("email")) # 6. Table builder (safe style) def build_table(title, data, color): table = "

" + title + "

" table = table + "" table = table + "" table = table + "" table = table + "" for key in data: table = table + "" table = table + "" table = table + "
CategoryCount
" + key + "" + str(data[key]) + "
" return table # 7. Build HTML tables status_table = build_table("Lead Status", status_counts, "#4caf50") temp_table = build_table("Lead Temperature", temperature_counts, "#2196f3") summary = ( "

📊 Summary for " + yesterday + "

" + "" + "" + "" + "" + "" + "" + "" + "
MetricCount
Total Leads" + str(len(leads)) + "
Follow-ups Done" + str(followup_done) + "
Follow-ups Pending" + str(followup_pending) + "
" ) sales_order_summary = build_table("Total Sales Orders", {"Sales Orders Created": total_sales_orders}, "#9c27b0") # 8. Final Email Content html = ( "

Dear Team,

" + "

Here is your Daily CRM Summary for " + yesterday + ".

" + summary + status_table + temp_table + sales_order_summary + "

Regards,
CRM System

" ) # 9. Send Email if recipients: frappe.sendmail( recipients=recipients, subject="📝 Daily CRM Summary - " + yesterday, message=html )

name: Weekly Summary – Send every Monday
script:
# Week Range: Last Monday to Sunday today = frappe.utils.nowdate() from_date = frappe.utils.add_days(today, -frappe.utils.getdate(today).weekday() - 7) to_date = frappe.utils.add_days(from_date, 6) # Get all Leads in the range leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", filters={"creation": ["between", [from_date + " 00:00:00", to_date + " 23:59:59"]]}, fields=["status", "lead_temperature", "follow_up_date"], ignore_permissions=True ) status_counts = {} temperature_counts = {} followup_done = 0 followup_pending = 0 for lead in leads: s = lead.get("status") or "Unknown" status_counts[s] = status_counts.get(s, 0) + 1 t = lead.get("lead_temperature") or "Not Set" temperature_counts[t] = temperature_counts.get(t, 0) + 1 if str(lead.get("follow_up_date")) >= from_date and str(lead.get("follow_up_date")) <= to_date: followup_done = followup_done + 1 else: followup_pending = followup_pending + 1 # Sales Orders sales_orders = frappe.get_all("Sales Order", filters={"creation": ["between", [from_date + " 00:00:00", to_date + " 23:59:59"]]}, fields=["name"], ignore_permissions=True ) # Email users user_ids = [r.parent for r in frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": ["in", ["Manager", "Owner"]]}, fields=["parent"])] users = frappe.get_all("User", filters={"name": ["in", user_ids], "enabled": 1}, fields=["email"]) recipients = [u.email for u in users if u.email] def build_table(title, data, color): table = "

" + title + "

" table = table + "" table = table + "" table = table + "" for key in data: table = table + "" table = table + "
CategoryCount
" + key + "" + str(data[key]) + "
" return table status_table = build_table("Lead Status", status_counts, "#4caf50") temp_table = build_table("Lead Temperature", temperature_counts, "#2196f3") sales_order_table = "

📦 Sales Orders

MetricCount
Total Sales Orders" + str(len(sales_orders)) + "
" summary = "

📊 Weekly Summary (" + from_date + " to " + to_date + ")

MetricCount
Total Leads" + str(len(leads)) + "
Follow-ups Done" + str(followup_done) + "
Follow-ups Pending" + str(followup_pending) + "
" html = "

Dear Team,

Please find below the Weekly CRM Summary for the period " + from_date + " to " + to_date + ".

" + summary + status_table + temp_table + sales_order_table + "

Regards,
CRM System

" if recipients: frappe.sendmail( recipients=recipients, subject="📅 Weekly CRM Summary | " + from_date + " to " + to_date, message=html )

name: Monthly Summary (send on 1st of month for last month)
script:
# 1. Calculate last month's range today = frappe.utils.getdate() first_day_this_month = frappe.utils.get_first_day(today) from_date = frappe.utils.add_months(first_day_this_month, -1) to_date = frappe.utils.add_days(first_day_this_month, -1) # 2. Get all Leads created last month leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", filters={"creation": ["between", [str(from_date) + " 00:00:00", str(to_date) + " 23:59:59"]]}, fields=["status", "lead_temperature", "follow_up_date"], ignore_permissions=True ) # 3. Count logic status_counts = {} temperature_counts = {} followup_done = 0 followup_pending = 0 for lead in leads: s = lead.get("status") or "Unknown" status_counts[s] = status_counts.get(s, 0) + 1 t = lead.get("lead_temperature") or "Not Set" temperature_counts[t] = temperature_counts.get(t, 0) + 1 f_date = str(lead.get("follow_up_date")) if f_date >= str(from_date) and f_date <= str(to_date): followup_done = followup_done + 1 else: followup_pending = followup_pending + 1 # 4. Sales Orders last month sales_orders = frappe.get_all("Sales Order", filters={"creation": ["between", [str(from_date) + " 00:00:00", str(to_date) + " 23:59:59"]]}, fields=["name"], ignore_permissions=True ) # 5. Manager/Owner emails user_ids = [r.parent for r in frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": ["in", ["Manager", "Owner"]]}, fields=["parent"])] users = frappe.get_all("User", filters={"name": ["in", user_ids], "enabled": 1}, fields=["email"]) recipients = [u.email for u in users if u.email] # 6. Table builder def build_table(title, data, color): table = "

" + title + "

" table = table + "" table = table + "" table = table + "" table = table + "" for key in data: table = table + "" table = table + "" table = table + "
CategoryCount
" + key + "" + str(data[key]) + "
" return table # 7. Summary tables status_table = build_table("Lead Status", status_counts, "#4caf50") temp_table = build_table("Lead Temperature", temperature_counts, "#2196f3") sales_table = "

📦 Sales Orders

MetricCount
Total Sales Orders" + str(len(sales_orders)) + "
" summary = "

📊 Monthly Summary (" + str(from_date) + " to " + str(to_date) + ")

MetricCount
Total Leads" + str(len(leads)) + "
Follow-ups Done" + str(followup_done) + "
Follow-ups Pending" + str(followup_pending) + "
" # 8. Final Email html = "

Dear Team,

Please find your Monthly CRM Summary for " + str(from_date) + " to " + str(to_date) + ".

" + summary + status_table + temp_table + sales_table + "

Regards,
CRM System

" # 9. Send if recipients: frappe.sendmail( recipients=recipients, subject="🗓️ Monthly CRM Summary | " + str(from_date) + " to " + str(to_date), message=html )

name: Financial Year Summary (Send on April 1st, covers last FY: April 1 – March 31)
script:
# # 1. Get last financial year date range # today = frappe.utils.getdate() # fy_start = frappe.utils.getdate(str(today.year - 1) + "-04-01") # fy_end = frappe.utils.getdate(str(today.year) + "-03-31") # # 2. Get all Leads in last FY # leads = frappe.get_all("Lead", # filters={"creation": ["between", [str(fy_start) + " 00:00:00", str(fy_end) + " 23:59:59"]]}, # fields=["status", "lead_temperature", "follow_up_date"], # ignore_permissions=True # ) # # 3. Count logic # status_counts = {} # temperature_counts = {} # followup_done = 0 # followup_pending = 0 # for lead in leads: # s = lead.get("status") or "Unknown" # status_counts[s] = status_counts.get(s, 0) + 1 # t = lead.get("lead_temperature") or "Not Set" # temperature_counts[t] = temperature_counts.get(t, 0) + 1 # f_date = str(lead.get("follow_up_date")) # if f_date >= str(fy_start) and f_date <= str(fy_end): # followup_done = followup_done + 1 # else: # followup_pending = followup_pending + 1 # # 4. Sales Orders in last FY # sales_orders = frappe.get_all("Sales Order", # filters={"creation": ["between", [str(fy_start) + " 00:00:00", str(fy_end) + " 23:59:59"]]}, # fields=["name"], # ignore_permissions=True # ) # # 5. Manager/Owner emails # user_ids = [r.parent for r in frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": ["in", ["Manager", "Owner"]]}, fields=["parent"])] # users = frappe.get_all("User", filters={"name": ["in", user_ids], "enabled": 1}, fields=["email"]) # recipients = [u.email for u in users if u.email] # # 6. Table builder # def build_table(title, data, color): # table = "

" + title + "

" # table = table + "" # table = table + "" # table = table + "" # table = table + "" # for key in data: # table = table + "" # table = table + "" # table = table + "
CategoryCount
" + key + "" + str(data[key]) + "
" # return table # # 7. Tables # status_table = build_table("Lead Status", status_counts, "#4caf50") # temp_table = build_table("Lead Temperature", temperature_counts, "#2196f3") # sales_table = "

📦 Sales Orders

MetricCount
Total Sales Orders" + str(len(sales_orders)) + "
" # summary = "

📊 Financial Year Summary (" + str(fy_start) + " to " + str(fy_end) + ")

MetricCount
Total Leads" + str(len(leads)) + "
Follow-ups Done" + str(followup_done) + "
Follow-ups Pending" + str(followup_pending) + "
" # # 8. Email # html = "

Dear Team,

Here is your Financial Year Summary from " + str(fy_start) + " to " + str(fy_end) + ".

" + summary + status_table + temp_table + sales_table + "

Regards,
CRM System

" # # 9. Send # if recipients: # frappe.sendmail( # recipients=recipients, # subject="📆 CRM FY Summary | " + str(fy_start) + " to " + str(fy_end), # message=html # ) #------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ # 1️⃣ Get last financial year date range today = frappe.utils.getdate() fy_start = frappe.utils.getdate(str(today.year - 1) + "-04-01") fy_end = frappe.utils.getdate(str(today.year) + "-03-31") fy_range = [str(fy_start) + " 00:00:00", str(fy_end) + " 23:59:59"] # 2️⃣ Lead Data leads = frappe.get_all( "Lead", filters={"creation": ["between", fy_range]}, fields=["name", "status", "lead_temperature", "lead_source"], ignore_permissions=True ) lead_count = len(leads) # Lead Source Count lead_source_counts = {} for lead in leads: src = lead.get("lead_source") or "Not Set" lead_source_counts[src] = lead_source_counts.get(src, 0) + 1 # 3️⃣ Opportunities from these Leads opps = frappe.get_all( "Opportunity", filters={"creation": ["between", fy_range]}, fields=["name", "party_name", "latest_inquiry_status"], ignore_permissions=True ) opp_count = len(opps) # 4️⃣ Quotations linked to these Opportunities quots = frappe.get_all( "Quotation", filters={"creation": ["between", fy_range]}, fields=["name", "opportunity"], ignore_permissions=True ) quot_count = len(quots) # 5️⃣ Sales Orders linked to these Quotations sos = frappe.get_all( "Sales Order", filters={"creation": ["between", fy_range]}, fields=["name", "quotation"], ignore_permissions=True ) so_count = len(sos) # 6️⃣ Funnel Count funnel_table = { "Leads Created": lead_count, "Converted to Opportunity": opp_count, "Converted to Quotation": quot_count, "Converted to Sales Order": so_count } # 7️⃣ Opportunity Status Count status_counts = {} for o in opps: s = o.get("latest_inquiry_status") or "Not Set" status_counts[s] = status_counts.get(s, 0) + 1 # 8️⃣ Follow-up Activity Count (Child Table) followup_raised = 0 followup_done = 0 for opp in opps: followups = frappe.get_all( "Follow Up Activity", filters={"parent": opp.name}, fields=["status", "follow_up_date"], ignore_permissions=True ) for f in followups: if f.get("follow_up_date") and (str(fy_start) <= str(f.get("follow_up_date")) <= str(fy_end)): if f.get("status") == "Done": followup_done += 1 else: followup_raised += 1 # 9️⃣ Table Builder def build_table(title, data, color): table = f"

{title}

" table += "" table += f"" table += "" table += "" for k, v in data.items(): table += f"" table += "
CategoryCount
{k}{v}
" return table # 🔟 Build Tables summary_table = build_table( f"📊 Financial Year Summary ({fy_start} to {fy_end})", {"Total Leads": lead_count, "Total Opportunities": opp_count, "Total Quotations": quot_count, "Total Sales Orders": so_count}, "#ff9800" ) funnel_html = build_table("🚀 Lead Conversion Funnel", funnel_table, "#4caf50") opp_status_html = build_table("🔥 Opportunity Inquiry Status", status_counts, "#2196f3") followup_html = build_table("📅 Follow-up Activity (Opportunities)", {"Follow-ups Raised": followup_raised, "Follow-ups Done": followup_done}, "#9c27b0") lead_source_html = build_table("🎯 Leads by Source", lead_source_counts, "#795548") # 11️⃣ Email Content html = f"""

Dear Team,

Here is your Financial Year CRM Summary from {fy_start} to {fy_end}.

{summary_table} {funnel_html} {opp_status_html} {followup_html} {lead_source_html}

Regards,
CRM System

""" # 12️⃣ Recipients (Managers & Owners) user_ids = [r.parent for r in frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": ["in", ["Manager", "Owner"]]}, fields=["parent"])] users = frappe.get_all("User", filters={"name": ["in", user_ids], "enabled": 1}, fields=["email"]) recipients = [u.email for u in users if u.email] # 13️⃣ Send Email if recipients: frappe.sendmail( recipients=recipients, subject=f"📆 CRM FY Summary | {fy_start} to {fy_end}", message=html )

name: Custom Background Update Time
task to follow v1
task to follow v2
script:
# Server Script for Task - After Insert if doc.is_follow_up_task: # Send notification to assigned user if doc.owner: frappe.sendmail( recipients=[doc.owner], subject=f"Follow Up Task Assigned - {doc.subject}", message=f"""

New Follow Up Task Assigned

Hello {doc.owner},

A new follow up task has been assigned to you:

{"" if doc.next_follow_up_date else ""}
Subject:{doc.subject}
Follow Up Type:{doc.follow_up_type}
Follow Up Date:{doc.follow_up_date}
Contact:{doc.contact_with}
Priority:{doc.priority}
Next Follow Up:" + str(doc.next_follow_up_date) + "

Please complete this follow up on time.

View Task

Best regards,
CRM System

""", header="Follow Up Task Assignment" ) # Create calendar event for next follow up if specified if doc.next_follow_up_date: try: event_doc = frappe.get_doc({ "doctype": "Event", "subject": f"Next Follow Up: {doc.contact_with}", "starts_on": str(doc.next_follow_up_date) + " 10:00:00", "ends_on": str(doc.next_follow_up_date) + " 11:00:00", "description": f"Next follow up for: {doc.subject}", "event_participants": [{"reference_doctype": "User", "reference_docname": doc.owner}] }) event_doc.insert() except: pass # Skip if event creation fails

name: GST
script:
# Server Script: Before Save on Quotation

total_gst = 0

for item in doc.items:
    base_amount = 0
    if item.amount:
        base_amount = item.amount
    elif item.rate and item.qty:
        base_amount = item.rate * item.qty

    # reset GST amounts
    item.custom_cgst_amount = 0
    item.custom_sgst_amount = 0
    item.custom_igst_amount = 0

    # In-State logic → CGST + SGST
    if doc.item_tax_category == "In-State":
        if not item.custom_cgst_rate or item.custom_cgst_rate == 0:
            item.custom_cgst_rate = 9
        if not item.custom_sgst_rate or item.custom_sgst_rate == 0:
            item.custom_sgst_rate = 9

        item.custom_cgst_amount = (base_amount * item.custom_cgst_rate) / 100
        item.custom_sgst_amount = (base_amount * item.custom_sgst_rate) / 100

    # Out-State logic → IGST
    elif doc.item_tax_category == "Out-State":
        if not item.custom_igst_rate or item.custom_igst_rate == 0:
            item.custom_igst_rate = 18

        item.custom_igst_amount = (base_amount * item.custom_igst_rate) / 100

    # update total GST
    total_gst = total_gst + item.custom_cgst_amount + item.custom_sgst_amount + item.custom_igst_amount

# update parent Quotation GST totals
doc.custom_total_gst = total_gst
doc.custom_total_with_gst = doc.base_total + total_gst

name: lead greetings 02
script:
if doc.email_id:
    # Load Email Template
    template = frappe.get_doc("Email Template", "Lead Introduction Mail")
    subject = template.subject
    message = frappe.render_template(template.response_html, {"doc": doc})

    # Get file by exact File URL from File Manager
    file_url = "/files/Corp_Product -150124 (1) (1) (1).pdf"
    file_doc = frappe.get_doc("File", {"file_url": file_url})

    # Send the email
    frappe.sendmail(
        recipients=[doc.email_id],
        subject=subject,
        message=message,
        attachments=[{
            "fname": file_doc.file_name,
            "fcontent": file_doc.get_content()
        }]
    )

    # Manually log the Communication so it shows in Activity
    comm = frappe.get_doc({
        "doctype": "Communication",
        "communication_type": "Communication",
        "communication_medium": "Email",
        "subject": subject,
        "content": message,
        "recipients": doc.email_id,
        "reference_doctype": "Lead",
        "reference_name": doc.name,
        "sent_or_received": "Sent"
    })
    comm.insert(ignore_permissions=True)

name: latest Iinquiry status
script:
# Server Script: Sync latest child Inquiry Status to parent Opportunity field

if doc.follow_up_activity:
    # Get last row from child table
    last_row = doc.follow_up_activity[-1]
    doc.latest_inquiry_status = last_row.inquiry_status
else:
    doc.latest_inquiry_status = None

# Check if the Opportunity is created from a Lead and a party (Lead) is linked
if doc.opportunity_from == "Lead" and doc.party_name:
    # Fetch the Lead document using the party_name (which stores the Lead ID)
    lead = frappe.get_doc("Lead", doc.party_name)
    
    # Copy custom fields from the Lead to the Opportunity
    # Assign the Lead's custom_state value if available, else keep it blank
    doc.custom_state = lead.custom_state if lead.get("custom_state") else ""
    
    # Assign the Lead's custom_country_link value if available, else keep it blank
    doc.custom_country_link = lead.custom_country_link if lead.get("custom_country_link") else ""
